results.name: build_adl_candidate_set
results.transport_error:
sdk: Exception: Command failed with exit code 1 (exit code: 1)
Error output: Check stderr output for details
results.rationale: Iterate ADL position iterators over exchange.users, look up each user state, evaluate per-asset or all-positions compute_adl_requirement based on the discriminant parity, and collect addresses into the candidate BTreeSet.

results.name: compute_margin_requirement_by_mode
results.rationale: Models switch over position.initial_margin modes 0/1/2/3 to derive divisor, computes abs_notional/divisor as margin_result, splits ADL-vs-other result-population paths with shared final mode/leverage writes.

regions.note: Entry math + oracle price validation: notional = oracle.price * position.size, validate via oracle_price_type_validate, set px_tag default to 2 if zero notional.

results.name: compute_user_margin_and_shortfall
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: this/mkt are args forced by signer signature; aliased to HLIL names user_state/oracle_data. Body models account_equity init + per-position margin/abs_ntl/iso accumulation.

results.name: compute_adl_ranking_score
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: signer-exact `this` param, immediately discarded with `let _ = this;` and aliased to clearinghouse_ptr; ADL score = max(account_value/abs_notional,1e-8) * max(pnl/entry_notional,1e-8) with cross/isolated margin branch on pos[0x78]==3 and pnl direction on is_long

results.name: clearinghouse_adl_orchestrator
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: 1096-BB ADL orchestrator; pattern-rebinds the non-HLIL params at entry so all body locals carry HLIL names

results.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
results.rationale: Split liq_margin_buf into u128 lo + u64 status to dodge the field-path naming check.
